title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON VA REHABILITATION CENTER AND CLINICS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Options for veterans seeking treatment for substance use problems, including individual and group therapy and medications to help clients reduce alcohol, tobacco, and drug use. VA providers know that, in many cases, substance use problems are continuing conditions that require care over a long period of time. For other veterans, substance use problems may be resolved more quickly with attention paid to related problems. Such related problems could be post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), depression, pain, disturbed sleep, irritability, and/or relationship problems. 8495 Crater Lake Highway White City, OR 97503 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 826-2111 3825 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 826-2111 ext 3825 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Screening and assessment process usually takes about 3 hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD214, photo ID, or other identifier of service. Also helpful to have documents to support claim or need. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Veterans Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Veterans Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment * Veterans Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VETERAN AND MILITARY HOSPITAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM MUTUAL SUPPORT - NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTHERN OREGON VA REHABILITATION CENTER AND CLINICS
